# Generic technical terms
backgrounding
backquotes
cooloff
crt
Dilithium
filewatcher
FQDNs
gui
hyperlinks
keypair
lte
MBytes
NONINFRINGEMENT
OIDC
remoting
seek'ed
tsv
vendored
vms

# Kubernetes and KubeBuilder
applyconfiguration
gvk
gvr
printcolumn

# Linux
binfmt
# as in /proc/*/cmdline
cmdline
COLORTERM
distros
kvm
# out of memory
OOM
opensuse
pgid
pids
qcow
rootfs
# as in /etc/sysconfig
sysconfig
tarball
veth
zst
zypper

# macOS
# metadata server, see mds_store
mds

# Windows
# typeperf binary logs
blg
Cim
cygwin
ERRORLEVEL
HKLM
LASTEXITCODE
LOCALAPPDATA
mnt
msys
MSYSTEM
netsh
PROGRAMFILES
pwsh
relog
SYSTEMROOT
taskkill
typeperf
UCRT
usebackq
WINDIR
winver
wsl
wslconfig
wslpath
wslservice
